max_clear_swap_label: {match3_rule_text} Which labeled swap arrow clears the most gems?
{match3_rule_text} Choose the arrow letter whose swap gives the largest immediate clear count.
{match3_rule_text} Among the labeled swap arrows, which one clears the maximum number of gems?
{match3_rule_text} Report the label of the swap arrow with the largest clear count.
{match3_rule_text} Which labeled adjacent swap removes the most gems immediately?
swap_clear_count: {match3_rule_text} If the marked swap is made, how many gems are in the straight matching runs that clear?
{match3_rule_text} Make the marked swap, then count only the gems in the straight matching runs that clear.
{match3_rule_text} After the marked swap, how many gems are part of a horizontal or vertical run that clears?
{match3_rule_text} Use the marked adjacent swap. How many gems clear from straight matching runs?
{match3_rule_text} What is the number of gems that clear after making the marked swap?
grid_color_gem_count: How many {target_color_label} gems are in the grid?
Count the {target_color_label} gems in the whole grid.
What is the total number of {target_color_label} gems on the board?
Find the number of {target_color_label} gems across the full grid.
How many gems in the grid are {target_color_label}?
row_color_gem_count: How many {target_color_label} gems are in row {row_index}?
What is the number of {target_color_label} gems in row {row_index}?
Find the {target_color_label} gem count for row {row_index}.
column_color_gem_count: How many {target_color_label} gems are in column {col_index}?
What is the number of {target_color_label} gems in column {col_index}?
Find the {target_color_label} gem count for column {col_index}.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_match3_grid: a match-3 jewel grid with row and column numbers, colored gems, and labeled adjacent-swap arrows
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_match3_count_grid: a match-3 jewel grid with row and column numbers and colored gems
code_prompt_defaults.match3_rule_text: Swap only the two adjacent gems connected by the marked arrow. After the swap, count gems only if they are part of a straight horizontal or vertical run of 3 or more matching gems. If no straight 3-or-more run is formed, the answer is 0. Do not apply falling, refill, special effects, or cascades.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_max_clear_swap_label: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the selected swap arrow
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_max_clear_swap_label: set "answer" to only the selected swap-arrow letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_swap_clear_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one for each gem that clears
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_swap_clear_count: set "answer" to the exact number of gems that clear, or 0 if none clear
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_grid_color_gem_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one for each matching gem
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_grid_color_gem_count: set "answer" to the exact count as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_row_color_gem_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one for each matching gem in the row
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_row_color_gem_count: set "answer" to the exact count as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_column_color_gem_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one for each matching gem in the column
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_column_color_gem_count: set "answer" to the exact count as an integer
